name: dev-workflows
description: Full product-development lifecycle workflow skills for GitHub Copilot CLI: idea → create-vi → create-ard → specify → design → epics → implement → document → release-notes → ready, plus vuln (CVE remediation), upgrade (dependency upgrades), update-vi (VI refresh), api-guideline-reviewer, guideline-reviewer, docs-profile, feedback, and prompt utilities. Strong-tier model routing (Opus 4.8/4.7/4.6 or GPT-5.5), branch management, dispatched Opus/GPT-5.5 review sub-agents, and automated maintenance. document: now grounds space-constrained runs on the counterpart space's existing docs as read-only reference. release-notes: now classifies a Change Type (Breaking change / New technology support / Bug fix / not applicable), shapes the Summary per type, and flags deprecations. When $DOCS_PATH is set, idea/create-vi/update-vi/create-ard/specify/epics/release-notes ground on the product's existing shipped documentation as read-only reference (docs-grounder; qmd with keyword + git-grep fallback). 20 user-facing skills + 32 sub-agents.
